measurement_note: Size is A=R*C, the matrix area. Every legal tier is a dense square matrix, so the Accepted row/column preprocessing and an independent transpose-count formulation use O(A) time. A correct slower implementation fully recounts the row and column for every 1, using O(A(R+C)) time; it completes the 8x8, 32x32, and 64x64 tiers, returns zero for each, and is rejected only by scaling.
